com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.MapValidator

Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static <K,​ V> MapValidator<K,​V> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(Map<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a Map.
    <K,​ V> MapValidator<K,​V> Requirements.validateThat​(Map<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a Map.

  • Uses of MapValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return MapValidator 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    MapValidator<K,​V> MapValidator.entrySet​(Consumer<CollectionValidator<Set<Map.Entry<K,​V>>,​Map.Entry<K,​V>>> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    MapValidator<K,​V> MapValidator.isEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is empty.
    MapValidator<K,​V> MapValidator.isNotEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is not empty.
    MapValidator<K,​V> MapValidator.keySet​(Consumer<CollectionValidator<Set<K>,​K>> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    MapValidator<K,​V> MapValidator.size​(Consumer<SizeValidator> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    <K,​ V> MapValidator<K,​V> JavaRequirements.validateThat​(Map<K,​V> actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a Map.
    MapValidator<K,​V> MapValidator.values​(Consumer<CollectionValidator<Collection<V>,​V>> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
